March 20, 2026

Hello World

My first blog post — a brief intro to what I'll be writing about here.

  • intro
  • general

Welcome to my blog! I’m Sayantan, a Full Stack Developer who enjoys building things for the web.

What to expect here

I’ll be writing about:

  • Software engineering — things I learn, patterns I find useful, mistakes I’ve made
  • Backend systems — Node.js, Java Spring Boot, AWS, distributed systems
  • Frontend craft — React, performance, accessibility
  • Tools & workflows — whatever’s making me more productive

A bit about me

I started my journey in web development back in 2020, and I’ve had the chance to work across startups and larger companies. My main focus these days is building systems that are fast, reliable, and actually pleasant to use.

If anything I write is useful to you, that’s a win. If you want to say hi, send me an email.

More posts coming soon.
